backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a simple chatbot backend with message storage, pattern-based response generation for greetings and service questions, and conversation retrieval functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting production-readiness updates to ContactSection.tsx including heading copy, styling, form labels, validation, and input attributes across five tracked requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components detailing responsive layouts, mobile optimizations, touch targets, performance tuning, and Tailwind v3 compatibility updates.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes, spacing, and design tokens for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component orchestrating all page sections, mobile detection, chatbot toggle state, and rendering navigation, hero, services, pricing, contact, and footer components with animated backgrounds.
frontend/src/components/AboutFounder.tsx: Founder section with responsive grid layout, founder image with glow effects, biography text, and blockquote, using scroll animation hook for reveal effects.
frontend/src/components/AISphereTHREE.ts: Three.js-based 3D animated AI sphere with mobile performance optimizations including reduced particle count, lower geometry detail, and power-efficient rendering settings.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedBackgrou: Renders a fixed animated grid background on canvas with mobile-responsive frame rates and grid sizes, overlaid on a static background image.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedConnecti: Displays an animated canvas with pulsing nodes and connection lines in a grid layout, with reduced complexity on mobile devices.
frontend/src/components/BrandMessage.tsx: Shows a glass-panel styled brand message highlighting AI-powered digital solutions and business transformation.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotButton.ts: Displays a fixed floating button with chatbot icon and notification badge to toggle the chat interface.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: Renders a fixed-position chat UI with message history, typing indicator, and input field using the useChatbot hook.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Provides a contact form and company contact information (email, phone, location) with scroll animation and form submission handling.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding, quick navigation links, and social media icons for multiple platforms.
frontend/src/components/GlobalVision.tsx: Displays a vision statement section with animated icons and statistics (projects, clients, support) in a glass-panel design.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Main landing hero section with animated 3D AI sphere, brand messaging, headline text, and three CTA buttons (Start Project, Schedule Consultation, WhatsApp). Uses responsive grid layout with AISphereTHREE component.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Chat message bubble component that displays user or bot messages with different styling, avatars, and alignment based on the author prop.
frontend/src/components/MockupCard.tsx: Animated card component displaying project mockup images with lazy loading, hover effects, and scroll-triggered animations. Supports desktop and mobile mockup types.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed header navigation with logo, desktop menu, mobile hamburger menu, and scroll-based glass morphism effect. Includes smooth scrolling to page sections.
frontend/src/components/ParticleField.ts: Canvas-based animated particle field background with connecting lines between nearby particles. Optimized for mobile with reduced particle count and lower FPS.
frontend/src/components/PricingCard.tsx: Pricing tier card component with feature list, price display, popular badge, and scroll-triggered animations. Includes CTA button that scrolls to contact section.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Pricing section displaying four pricing tiers (Starter, Business Pro, AI Powered, Mobile App) in a responsive grid with scroll animations.
Showcase section displaying five project mockups (trading dashboard, chatbot, SaaS panel, mobile app, automation flow) in a responsive grid using MockupCard components.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCalculato: Interactive project cost calculator component with checkboxes for features (website, mobile app, AI, e-commerce, automation) that displays estimated costs and handles calculation via useProjectEstimate hook.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying a service with icon, title, and description, featuring scroll-triggered animations and hover effects.
Section component that displays a grid of six AI-focused services (website, mobile apps, SaaS, automation, e-commerce) using ServiceCard components with staggered animations.
Section displaying six AI technologies (Machine Learning, OpenAI, ChatGPT, etc.) in a grid with animated connections and pulsing indicators.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with a specific phone number when clicked.
frontend/src/components/WhyYadavTech.tsx: Section component showcasing six key benefits/differentiators (AI-first architecture, scalability, support, etc.) in a grid layout with checkmark icons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatbot.ts: Custom hook managing chatbot state including messages, input handling, auto-scrolling, and automatic greeting message on first load using session storage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjectEstimate.ts: Hook that calculates project cost estimates based on selected features (website, mobile app, AI, e-commerce, automation) with client-side pricing logic and simulated async operation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching conversation messages and sending user messages via the ICP actor, with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger visibility state when an element scrolls into viewport, used for scroll-based animations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for dark theme colors (space-black, neon-blue, electric-purple), glassmorphism utilities, gradient text, glow effects, and keyframe animations for floating, fade-in, and tech pulse effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color system, custom shadows (glow effects), border radius variables, and keyframe animations for accordion, float, and other UI effects.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for "Yadav Tech Portfolio" containing six existing features focused on updating H2 headings, container divs, form labels, and input elements to production-ready standards.
